label: Refund Request Routing
description: When an email is classified as a refund request, escalation is required — AI must only acknowledge receipt, never confirm or process refunds

causal_translation.trigger_text: Email classified as a refund request.
causal_translation.rule_text: Refund requests involve financial commitments that only the billing team can authorize.
causal_translation.shift_text: Escalation flag activated — reply must be reviewed before sending.
causal_translation.effect_text: Escalation required: TRUE. AI may acknowledge but cannot action the refund.
